Fact.Name: Excess advance premium tax credit repayment
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 1a. Excess advance premium tax credit repayment from Form 8962.

Fact.Name: Repayment of new clean vehicle credit
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 1b. Repayment of new clean vehicle credit(s) transferred to a registered dealer from Schedule A (Form 8936), Part II.

Fact.Name: Repayment of previously owned clean vehicle credit
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 1c. Repayment of previously owned clean vehicle credit(s) transferred to a registered dealer from Schedule A (Form 8936), Part IV.

Fact.Name: Recapture of net EPE
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 1d. Recapture of net EPE from Form 4255, line 2a, column (l).

Fact.Name: Excessive payments - Line 1a
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 1e checkbox (i). Excessive payments on gross EPE from Form 4255 relates to line 1a.

Fact.Name: Excessive payments - Line 1c
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 1e checkbox (ii). Excessive payments on gross EPE from Form 4255 relates to line 1c.

Fact.Name: Excessive payments - Line 1d
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 1e checkbox (iii). Excessive payments on gross EPE from Form 4255 relates to line 1d.

Fact.Name: Excessive payments - Line 2a
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 1e checkbox (iv). Excessive payments on gross EPE from Form 4255 relates to line 2a.

Fact.Name: Excessive payments on gross EPE
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 1e. Excessive payments (EPs) on gross EPE from Form 4255.

Fact.Name: 20% EP - Line 1a
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 1f checkbox (i). 20% EP from Form 4255 relates to line 1a.

Fact.Name: 20% EP - Line 1c
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 1f checkbox (ii). 20% EP from Form 4255 relates to line 1c.

Fact.Name: 20% EP - Line 1d
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 1f checkbox (iii). 20% EP from Form 4255 relates to line 1d.

Fact.Name: 20% EP - Line 2a
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 1f checkbox (iv). 20% EP from Form 4255 relates to line 2a.

Fact.Name: 20% EP from Form 4255
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 1f. 20% EP from Form 4255.

Fact.Name: Other additions to tax
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 1y. Other additions to tax.

Fact.Name: Total additions to tax
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 1z. Add lines 1a through 1y.

Fact.Name: Alternative minimum tax
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 2. Alternative minimum tax from Form 6251.

Fact.Name: Total additional tax
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 3. Add lines 1z and 2. Enter here and on Form 1040, line 17.

Fact.Name: SE tax exemption - Form 4361
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 4 checkbox 1. Self-employment tax exemption from Form 4361.

Fact.Name: SE tax exemption - Form 4029
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 4 checkbox 2. Self-employment tax exemption from Form 4029.

Fact.Name: SE tax exemption - other
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 4 checkbox 3. Other self-employment tax exemption.

Fact.Name: Self-employment tax
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 4. Self-employment tax from Schedule SE.

Fact.Name: Social security and Medicare tax on unreported tips
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 5. Social security and Medicare tax on unreported tip income from Form 4137.

Fact.Name: Uncollected social security and Medicare tax on wages
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 6. Uncollected social security and Medicare tax on wages from Form 8919.

Fact.Name: Total additional social security and Medicare tax
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 7. Add lines 5 and 6.

Fact.Name: Additional tax on IRAs or other tax-favored accounts
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 8. Additional tax on IRAs or other tax-favored accounts from Form 5329.

Fact.Name: Household employment taxes
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 9. Household employment taxes from Schedule H.

Fact.Name: Additional Medicare Tax
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 11. Additional Medicare Tax from Form 8959.

Fact.Name: Net investment income tax
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 12. Net investment income tax from Form 8960.

Fact.Name: Uncollected social security and Medicare or RRTA tax
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 13. Uncollected social security and Medicare or RRTA tax on tips or group-term life insurance from Form W-2, box 12.

Fact.Name: Interest on installment income
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 14. Interest on tax due on installment income from the sale of certain residential lots and timeshares.

Fact.Name: Interest on deferred tax on installment sales
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 15. Interest on the deferred tax on gain from certain installment sales with a sales price over $150,000.

Fact.Name: Recapture of low-income housing credit
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 16. Recapture of low-income housing credit from Form 8611.

Fact.Name: Recapture of other credits
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 17a. Recapture of other credits.

Fact.Name: Recapture of federal mortgage subsidy
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 17b. Recapture of federal mortgage subsidy.

Fact.Name: Additional tax on HSA distributions
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 17c. Additional tax on HSA distributions from Form 8889.

Fact.Name: Additional tax on HSA - ineligible individual
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 17d. Additional tax on an HSA because you didn't remain an eligible individual from Form 8889.

Fact.Name: Additional tax on Archer MSA distributions
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 17e. Additional tax on Archer MSA distributions from Form 8853.

Fact.Name: Additional tax on Medicare Advantage MSA distributions
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 17f. Additional tax on Medicare Advantage MSA distributions from Form 8853.

Fact.Name: Recapture of charitable contribution deduction
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 17g. Recapture of a charitable contribution deduction related to a fractional interest in tangible personal property.

Fact.Name: Nonqualified deferred compensation - section 409A
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 17h. Income from a nonqualified deferred compensation plan that fails to meet the requirements of section 409A.

Fact.Name: Nonqualified deferred compensation - section 457A
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 17i. Compensation from a nonqualified deferred compensation plan described in section 457A.

Fact.Name: Section 72(m)(5) excess benefits tax
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 17j. Section 72(m)(5) excess benefits tax.

Fact.Name: Golden parachute payments
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 17k. Golden parachute payments.

Fact.Name: Tax on accumulation distribution of trusts
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 17l. Tax on accumulation distribution of trusts.

Fact.Name: Excise tax on insider stock compensation
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 17m. Excise tax on insider stock compensation from an expatriated corporation.

Fact.Name: Look-back interest
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 17n. Look-back interest under section 167(g) or 460(b) from Form 8697 or 8866.

Fact.Name: Tax on non-effectively connected income
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 17o. Tax on non-effectively connected income for any part of the year you were a nonresident alien from Form 1040-NR.

Fact.Name: Interest from Form 8621, line 16f
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 17p. Any interest from Form 8621, line 16f, relating to distributions from, and dispositions of, stock of a section 1291 fund.

Fact.Name: Interest from Form 8621, line 24
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 17q. Any interest from Form 8621, line 24.

Fact.Name: Other additional taxes
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 17z. Any other taxes.

Fact.Name: Total additional taxes
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 18. Add lines 17a through 17z.

Fact.Name: Recapture of net EPE
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 19. Recapture of net EPE from Form 4255, line 1d, column (l).

Fact.Name: Section 965 net tax liability installment
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 20. Section 965 net tax liability installment from Form 965-A.

Fact.Name: Total other taxes
Fact.Description: Schedule 2 line 21. Add lines 4, 7 through 16, 18, and 19. Enter here and on Form 1040, line 23.
